$comment: Atrium publishes itself as an installable Claude Code marketplace. Point Claude Code at this repo (`/plugin marketplace add https://github.com/kushal-goenka/atrium`) and the ops plugin below appears in the catalog — the same registry Atrium serves to its own users.
name: atrium-ops

plugins.name: atrium-ops
plugins.description: Interactive skills for provisioning, diagnosing, and managing Atrium deployments. Install once and your agent can walk you through org setup, local dev bootstrap, LLM provider configuration, and runtime health diagnosis.
